title: Lifesteal Plugin
description: A PvP survival plugin where killing players steals their hearts. Features heart crafting, revive beacons, and permanent elimination for those who reach 0 hearts!
body:
# ⚔️ Lifesteal SMP Plugin

Transform your Minecraft server into a high-stakes PvP survival experience where every death has real consequences! When you kill another player, you steal one of their hearts, permanently increasing your maximum health. But beware—if you die with only 1 heart remaining, you'll be eliminated from the server!

## ✨ Features

### Heart Stealing Mechanic
- Kill players to **steal their hearts** and increase your max health
- Each heart adds 1 full heart (2 HP) to your maximum health
- Lose hearts when killed by other players
- Hearts drop as items when the killer is at maximum capacity

### Elimination System
- Players with only **1 heart** who die are **permanently banned**
- Banned players can only return if someone crafts a Revive Beacon
- Creates intense, meaningful PvP where every fight matters

### Heart Management
- **Withdraw hearts** using `/withdraw [amount]` to convert them into items
- Trade hearts with other players
- Store hearts safely in chests
- Use heart items to increase your maximum health

### Configuration Options
Fully customizable via `config.yml`:
- **max-hearts**: Maximum hearts a player can have (default: 20)
- **starting-hearts**: Hearts new players start with (default: 10)
- **revive-hearts**: Hearts players get when revived (default: 3)
- **drop-hearts-on-natural-death**: Whether non-PvP deaths drop hearts (default: false)

## 🎮 Commands

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---------|-------------|------------|
| `/withdraw [amount]` | Withdraw hearts into items | Everyone |
| `/w [amount]` | Alias for withdraw | Everyone |
| `/wd [amount]` | Alias for withdraw | Everyone |
| `/hearts [player]` | Check heart count | Everyone |
| `/revive <player>` | Revive a banned player | Requires Revive Beacon or OP |

## 🛡️ Anti-Dupe Protection

This plugin includes comprehensive protection against duplication exploits:

- ✅ **Strict item validation** - Hearts must have exact name, lore, and enchantments
- ✅ **Recipe verification** - Revive Beacons validate all hearts are legitimate
- ✅ **Economic balance** - Reviving costs more hearts than it returns (5 → 3)
- ✅ **Max heart overflow** - Hearts drop as items instead of disappearing
- ✅ **Natural death control** - Prevent exploiting PvE deaths
- ✅ **No command spawning** - Only legitimate crafting/withdrawal creates items

## 🐛 Support

Found a bug or have a suggestion? Please report it in the [Discord](https://discord.gg/M5snvUMkQC)!

## 📜 License

This plugin is released under the MIT License. Feel free to use it on your server!

---

*Made with ❤️ for the Minecraft community*
